text: Now, there are presents. How many presents do you get there? Four. All right. Peppers are coming up. You will be one, Mr. Finch. You will be one, Mr. French. Was there a snowman hiding up there, Nico? Snowman with a plunger. He needs new batteries. Yeah, we'll do that tomorrow. He can play with them tonight. Some of the stars. He packed up his bed. He packed up his sleeve. Alright, he packed up his snakes. He packed up his sleigh. He backed up his sleigh. Yeah, he packed up his sleigh. Good job, buddy. He packed up his thing.
